description_long: This is a large, heavily armored combat vehicle with a dark blue exterior accented by gold trim and insignia. The vehicle features a prominent central turret equipped with a large, multi-barreled cannon and several secondary weapon mounts, including side-mounted guns and smaller turrets. The hull is angular and robust, with reinforced armor plating covering the entire body, including the front, sides, and turret. The vehicle moves on wide, continuous tracks, providing stability and traction over urban terrain. Distinctive gold fleur-de-lis emblems and other military markings are visible on the sides and front. The top of the turret includes hatches and what appears to be a commander's cupola, suggesting crew access and operational control from within.
description: A large, dark blue armored combat vehicle with gold accents, multiple weapon mounts, and heavy tracks. Features reinforced plating, a central turret, and prominent military insignia.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, angular hull, dual side-mounted guns, and the main cannon centered above the reinforced front armor.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long tracks, gold fleur-de-lis emblem, side-mounted weapons, and the full length of the main turret and cannon.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, rear hatches, and the helipad marking on the turret roof, with the tracks and gold insignia visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, cannon, side weapons, and gold detailing, with visible access hatches and armor panels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large multi-barreled cannon on the main turret roof, two side-mounted guns on the front hull, and two smaller turrets on the sides of the main turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular steel and composite armor plating; reinforced front and turret, sloped panels for deflection, and visible modular sections.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark blue paint scheme with gold trim and insignia; no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: Gold fleur-de-lis emblems on both sides and front, gold 'H' marking on turret roof, and gold trim lines along the hull.
